headline: BXP Secures 320K Sq.Ft. Lease With Boston Dynamics at Reservoir Place
summary: BXP signs a long-term 320,000-square-foot lease with Boston Dynamics at Reservoir Place. This represents one of Greater Boston's largest innovation office deals this year.

raw.headline: BXP Secures 320K Sq.Ft. Lease With Boston Dynamics at Reservoir Place

headline: Here's What to Expect From Prologis' Next Earnings Report
summary: Prologis is set to announce its second-quarter earnings next month, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by a single digit.
